package rulecoverage

func NegativeMiddlewareUsesGlobalLoggerOrConfigSingleton() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_uses_global_logger_or_config_singleton"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Middleware that depends on mutable globals instead of injected config and logger instances."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
